org.docgene.model

Class XMLRedirect

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLRedirect
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Article, ArticleReference, ElementReference, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLRedirect
extends java.lang.Object
implements Article, ArticleReference
    Represents an XML redirect article.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.Article

        INDEX, INDEX_LC, TYPE_ARTICLE, TYPE_DISAMB, TYPE_FALLBACK, TYPE_INDEX, TYPE_RAW_HTML, TYPE_REDIRECT, TYPE_TEMPLATE

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      Return the referenced article package.

      Return the root directory.

      Return the article name suffix (used for articles which have the name of an already existing article).

      Return false.

      Return true if the article has a separate ID.

      Return true if the article has a package.

      Return true if the reference is bound.

      Return true if the article title should keep the title description case.

    • Constructor Detail

      • XMLRedirect

        public XMLRedirect(java.lang.String desc,
                   boolean keepCase)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        desc - the article description. The article getID() will be equal to its description
        keepCase - true if the article description should keep the title description case

      • XMLRedirect

        public XMLRedirect(java.lang.String id,
                   java.lang.String desc,
                   boolean keepCase)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        id - the article id
        desc - the article description
        keepCase - true if the article description should keep the title description case

      • addAlternateTitle

        public boolean addAlternateTitle(java.lang.String title,
                                 boolean keepCase,
                                 boolean inDictionnary)
        Add an alternate title to the article.
        Specified by:
        addAlternateTitle in interface Article
        Parameters:
        title - the alternate title
        keepCase - true if the title description should keep the title description case
        inDictionnary - true if the alternate title must be included in the dictionnary and categories
        Returns:
        true if the alternate title can be added
